articles.title: West Indies Women vs Sri Lanka Women T20 World Cup Live Score Updates, 2026: Pitch conditions and weather update
articles.description: West Indies Women's bowling unit is all set to face a tough challenge against a resurging Sri Lanka Women in the upcoming Women's T20 World Cup match at the County Ground in Bristol. After kickstarting their campaign with narrow wins, the West Indies find themselves sitting comfortably at the top of the standings, eyeing a semifinal berth. Meanwhile, Sri Lanka occupies a strong position after bouncing back from an early defeat to stun the defending champions, New Zealand. Historically, West Indies have carried a massive reputation in this tournament, but Sri Lanka holds a psychological 2-0 edge over them from their bilateral T20I series in the Caribbean earlier this year, ensuring that Group B remains completely wide open.

articles.title: Injury blow for India ! Varun Chakravarthy ruled out of Ireland T20I series
articles.description: India's T20I series against Ireland faces a blow as spinner Varun Chakravarthy is sidelined by a foot injury. Shreyas Iyer will captain the squad, featuring 15-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's debut. Mohammed Siraj is rested, replaced by Prasidh Krishna. India aims to maintain its perfect T20I record against Ireland in the upcoming two-match series.

articles.title: ‘Completely useless’: Jérémy Doku criticised over plan to leave Belgium World Cup to attend birth of first child
articles.description: Belgium winger Jérémy Doku has sparked debate at the FIFA World Cup 2026 after saying he may leave the tournament to attend the birth of his first child. The Manchester City star’s comments divided opinion in France, with some criticising the decision and others defending him, as Belgium’s campaign continues amid illness concerns and growing off-field controversy.

articles.title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi scripts history, hits fastest fifty in List A cricket
articles.description: Indian prodigy Vaibhav Sooryavanshi achieved a historic feat in the Tri-Nation Series final, smashing the fastest fifty in List A cricket history. The 15-year-old opener blazed to his half-century in a mere 11 deliveries against Sri Lanka A. This electrifying performance, marked by powerful hitting, shattered the previous world record and showcased the young talent's remarkable prowess on the international stage.

articles.description: Former US Olympian David Hearn was arrested near the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool, accused of damaging the recently renovated landmark. The incident occurred just before President Trump publicly condemned vandalism at the site.
